title: Competitive programming stress suite derived from recent hard Codeforces problems
instruction: Solve the ten competitive-programming problems in this workspace. Each problem has exactly one public sample. Implement solutions/p01/solution.mjs through solutions/p10/solution.mjs. You may run public samples with npm run sample -- p01 or npm run sample:all, run custom input with npm run run -- p01, and query the black-box hidden judge with npm run judge -- p01 or npm run judge -- all. The black-box judge returns only PASS or FAIL and will not reveal failing tests. Iterate until your own samples/custom tests and the black-box judge pass as much as possible. Do not inspect benchmark internals outside this workspace.
notes: Agent-visible judge returns only PASS/FAIL. The final grader reports per-problem status after the run.
